***REMOVED***user-home [![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/sindresorhus/user-home.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/sindresorhus/user-home)

> Get the path to the user home directory


#***REMOVED***Install

```sh
$ npm install --save user-home
```


#***REMOVED***Usage

```js
var userHome = require('user-home');

console.log(userHome);
//=> /Users/sindresorhus
```

Returns `null` in the unlikely scenario that the home directory can't be found.


#***REMOVED***CLI

```sh
$ npm install --global user-home
```

```sh
$ user-home --help

Example
  $ user-home
  /Users/sindresorhus
```
